must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Majority Acquisition and Financing of Zenith Mangga Berhad (listed on the Main Market of Bursa Kencana) by Aurora Sejahtera Capital Sdn Bhd.
Structure: Aurora to acquire 55% of the enlarged share capital via a combination of RM240,000,000 cash consideration and RM80,000,000 subscription of Redeemable Convertible Preference Shares (RCPS).
Financing: Concurrent issuance of RM150,000,000 5-year sukuk murabahah at 5.25% p.a.; proceeds to refinance working capital and scale the PalmBright oil analytics line and the KitePay vendor portal.

Timeline: Signing targeted within 30 days of exclusivity; Bursa Kencana announcement to follow immediately upon definitive agreement; completion within 90 days subject to regulatory approvals and financing drawdown; Aurora’s “north star” for integration is a single ERP within 6 months.
